Independent Business or Avocation
In an independent business or profession one may earn huge profit
or sustail colossal loss. Some times such business is wound up abruptly.
It is considered that the 7th, the 10111 , the 2114 and the 111 " houses
govern in(ome from an independent avocation. Huge income does not
necessarily mean profit; income may be huge but losses too might folow
due to swindling or over spending. Out of these four houses rel)fesenting
busi'less the 7tt1 house indicates one's total independence on his business
or profession.
